zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen Fitzgerald於大約1450年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 唐希爾斯波洛 卡素時，她的父親Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond32歲，母親Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry20歲。她於大約1490年與King Turlogh O'Brian結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1497年11月14日之後在愛爾蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen Fitzgerald于大约1450年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 唐希爾斯波洛 卡素时，她的父亲Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond32岁，母亲Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry20岁。她于大约1490年与King Turlogh O'Brian结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1497年11月14日之后在爱尔兰。

nameMeanings.name: Fitzgerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen Fitzgerald was born about 1450, in Hillsborough Castle, County Down, Ireland, her father, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond, was 32 and her mother, Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, was 20. She married King Turlogh O'Brian about 1490. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died after 14 November 1497, in Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen Fitzgerald est née environ 1450, à Hillsborough Castle, County Down, Irlande, son père, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé King Turlogh O'Brian environ 1490. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 14 novembre 1497, à Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellen Fitzgerald um 1450 in Hillsborough Castle, County Down, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond 32 und ihre Mutter Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry 20. Sie hat um 1490 King Turlogh O'Brian geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 14. November 1497 in Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Fitzgerald è nata il circa 1450 nel Hillsborough Castle, County Down, Irlanda, sua padre, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato King Turlogh O'Brian circa 1490. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 14 novembre 1497, nel Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Fitzgeraldが約1450年にアイルランドコウントイ ダウンヒルスボロウ カストルで生まれた時，父Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmondは32歳，母Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barryは20歳であった。約1490年にKing Turlogh O'Brianと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1497年11月14日以後にアイルランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Fitzgerald(이)가 대략 1450년 아일랜드 카운티 다운 힐스버루그h 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1490년 King Turlogh O'Brian(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1497년 11월 14일 이후 아일랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Fitzgerald nasceu aproximadamente 1450, em Hillsborough Castle, County Down, Irlanda, seu pai, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com King Turlogh O'Brian aproximadamente 1490. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 14 de novembro de 1497, em Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen Fitzgerald родилась около 1450 г. в местности хиллсбороую кастл, коунти доун, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени King Turlogh O'Brian около 1490 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла после 14 ноябрь 1497 г. в местности Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellen Fitzgerald nació aproximadamente 1450, en Hillsborough Castle, County Down, Irlanda, su papá, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, tenía 20 años. Se casó con King Turlogh O'Brian aproximadamente 1490. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió después de 14 de noviembre de 1497, en Irlanda.
